source.title: What is PVP in Star Atlas?
source.author: ATMTA / Star Atlas official publisher

summary.archival_abstract: Official support article titled “What is PVP in Star Atlas?.” This record preserves what Star Atlas Support / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text:
PVP in Star Atlas stands for POLIS Voting Power. It’s the measurement of your influence in the Star Atlas DAO, the decentralized governance system that lets players shape the future of the ecosystem.
What Is POLIS Voting Power (PVP)?
PVP is earned by locking POLIS tokens in the POLIS Locker. The amount of PVP you receive depends on:
How much POLIS you lock
How long you lock it for
The longer the lock duration (up to 5 years), the more PVP you receive per POLIS. For example, locking 100 POLIS for 5 years gives you 500 PVP. PVP linearly decays as the lock approaches expiration.
What Can You Do with PVP?
Vote on DAO proposals that guide game development, treasury usage, and ecosystem decisions.
Access exclusive community areas, including the Foundation Room and Foundation Room Chat on the official Star Atlas Discord: https://discord.gg/staratlas
